name: campusiq-africa
description: CampusIQ Africa — Offline-first PWA for administering Schools & Universities (General, Technical/Vocational, Higher Ed) across Africa. Single Railway service: Express API + React PWA, Google Sheets as the data backend.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
